ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES PURSUANT TO CCP 425.16(C) HEARING SET FOR JAN-30-2023 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-30-2023 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JANE LEE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. WHILE THE COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED, THE COURT WILL RULE ON THE MERITS OF THE MOTION FOR THE PURPOSES OF DETERMINATION OF THE PREVAILING PARTY. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO THE FOLLOWING PARTS OF THE COMPLAINT: A) THE WORDS "FILING A FRIVOLOUS LAWSUIT. CGC-597416" IN PARAGRAPH 4, 3:2-5; B) SENTENCE "FINALLY, IN JANUARY 2022, MR. WASSERMAN RESORTED TO USING A FRIVOLOUS LAWSUIT TO HARASS AND INTIMIDATED PLAINTIFFS. CGC-22-597416." 8, 3:25-27; C) PORTIONS OF PARAGRAPH 11: "AFTER FILING HIS LAWSUIT, IN DEPOSITIONS, MR. WASSERMAN BADGERED PLAINTIFF HELEN OKAMOTO WITH IRRELEVANT QUESTIONS INTENDED ONLY TO HARASS HER" AT 4:21-23; "DUE TO THE LAWSUIT" AT 4:23; AND "AND LAWSUIT" AT 4:26. D) THE WORDS "WITH A FRIVOLUS LAWSUIT" IN PRAGAPH 17 AT 5:29. THE MOTION IS OTHERWISE DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT PREVAILED ON THIS MOTION AND IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Off Calendar

MOTION TO REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES PURSUANT TO CCP 425.16(C)
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

MOTION TO REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES PURSUANT TO CCP 425.16(C) is GRANTED in the amount of $2,137.50.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT JANE LEE'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED in part and denied in part. While the complaint is dismissed, the Court will rule on the merits of the motion for the purposes of determination of the prevailing party. The motion is granted as to the following parts of the Complaint: a) The words "filing a frivolous lawsuit. CGC-597416" in paragraph 4, 3:2-5; b) Sentence "Finally, in January 2022, Mr. Wasserman resorted to using a frivolous lawsuit to harass and intimidated Plaintiffs. CGC-22-597416." 8, 3:25-27; c) Portions of paragraph 11: "After filing his lawsuit, in depositions, Mr. Wasserman badgered Plaintiff Helen Okamoto with irrelevant questions intended only to harass her" at 4:21-23; "due to the lawsuit" at 4:23; and "and lawsuit" at 4:26. d) The words "with a frivolus lawsuit" in pragaph 17 at 5:29. The motion is otherwise denied. The Court finds that Defendant prevailed on this motion and is entitled to recover reasonable attorney's fees.

Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion Of Request For Attorney Fees Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 (C)
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JANE LEE's Motion Of Request For Attorney Fees Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16(C).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar for department 302. Noticed for department 501.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
